prediction.reasoning: For a 3-day horizon on a large-cap industrial stock like Honeywell, I used historical volatility patterns showing daily moves typically around 1-2%. The point estimate assumes no directional bias in the short term. Confidence intervals are based on estimated 3-day volatility of approximately 2.8% (annualized ~20% volatility), with intervals widening symmetrically around the current price using normal distribution assumptions for short-term price movements.
